messages: Gaddy: I'll call the supplier today

expected_commitments.context: I'll call the supplier today

messages: Alice: can someone send me the report by Friday?
policy_note: A request with no acceptance or volunteer is not yet a commitment.

messages: Gaddy: if they send the quote, I'll approve it
policy_note: Conditional promise where condition has not been met → ignore, not a commitment yet.

messages: Gaddy: we should really call the supplier about the delay
policy_note: 'We should do X' is an opinion, not a commitment to act.

messages: Gaddy: what time is the meeting tomorrow?
Gaddy: I will send the documents

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents by end of the quarter

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents by end of the quarter

policy_note: Relative deadline 'by end of the quarter' is a valid explicit deadline.

messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents before the meeting

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents before the meeting

policy_note: Deadline implied by an event ('before the meeting') is a valid explicit deadline.

messages:
Gaddy: I'll send the documents by Friday
Gaddy: actually, let me send them by tomorrow instead

expected_commitments.context: actually, let me send them by tomorrow instead

policy_note: When two deadlines are mentioned, use the most recent/specific one.

messages: Gaddy: I will send the documents next week

expected_commitments.context: I will send the documents next week

messages: Gaddy: Bob will send the documents by Friday

expected_commitments.context: Bob will send the documents by Friday

messages: Gaddy: the contractor needs to finish the renovation by next week

expected_commitments.context: the contractor needs to finish the renovation by next week

policy_note: Party implied by role title, not a named person.

messages: Gaddy: Dana will handle the invoice payment by Friday

expected_commitments.context: Dana will handle the invoice payment by Friday

policy_note: Speaker names someone else as responsible without their confirmation → commitment with named person as party.

messages:
Alice: I talked to the lawyer yesterday
Alice: he said he'll file the motion by Wednesday

expected_commitments.context: he said he'll file the motion by Wednesday

policy_note: Party must be inferred from conversational context, not explicitly named in the commitment sentence.

messages:
Gaddy: someone needs to book the meeting room for Tuesday
Dana: I'll book it

expected_commitments.context: Gaddy asked someone to book the meeting room, Dana volunteered

messages: Gaddy: I'll upload the signed form by Wednesday

expected_commitments.context: I'll upload the signed form by Wednesday

messages: Gaddy: I'll review the contract, sign it, and send it back by tomorrow

expected_commitments.required_action: Review, sign, and send back the contract
expected_commitments.context: I'll review the contract, sign it, and send it back by tomorrow

policy_note: Multi-step action described in one message → single commitment with combined action.

messages:
Gaddy: I need to handle the paperwork
Gaddy: specifically the vendor registration forms
Gaddy: I'll do it by Wednesday

expected_commitments.context: I need to handle the paperwork, specifically the vendor registration forms

policy_note: Action details split across multiple messages → single commitment combining the information.

messages: Dana: I'll settle the invoice by Friday

expected_commitments.context: I'll settle the invoice by Friday

messages: Gaddy: I'll draft the report by end of week

expected_commitments.context: I'll draft the report by end of week

messages: Dana: done, the invoice is paid

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-300", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Bob", "required_action": "Prepare the report", "deadline": "Friday", "context": "Bob will prepare the report by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Charlie: Alice told me Bob submitted the report yesterday

expected_commitments.context: Alice told me Bob submitted the report yesterday

policy_note: Third-party reports completion of someone else's commitment → done.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: forget about calling the supplier unless they respond today

expected_commitments.context: forget about calling the supplier unless they respond today

policy_note: Conditional dismiss ('unless they respond today') → keep waiting, update deadline.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "tomorrow", "context": "I will send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I sent 3 out of the 5 documents, will send the rest tomorrow

expected_commitments.context: I sent 3 out of the 5 documents, will send the rest tomorrow

policy_note: Partial completion ('sent 3 out of 5 documents') → not done, still waiting.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-300", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Bob", "required_action": "Prepare the report", "deadline": "Friday", "context": "Bob will prepare the report by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Alice: Bob finished the report and submitted it

expected_commitments.context: Bob finished the report and submitted it

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-300", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Bob", "required_action": "Prepare the report", "deadline": "Friday", "context": "Bob will prepare the report by Friday", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Bob: I need more time, can I prepare the report by next Monday?

expected_commitments.context: I need more time, can I prepare the report by next Monday?

policy_note: Deadline update by the committed party themselves.

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-123", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Send the documents", "deadline": "tomorrow", "context": "I will send the documents by tomorrow", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll send the documents once the legal team approves them

expected_commitments.context: I'll send the documents once the legal team approves them

existing_commitments_json: [{"id": "abc-456", "chat_id": "972546610653@c.us", "chat_name": "Gaddy", "committed_party": "Gaddy", "required_action": "Call the supplier", "deadline": null, "context": "Need to call the supplier about the order", "status": "waiting", "notification": "none"}]
messages: Gaddy: I'll call the supplier about the new order today instead of the old one

expected_commitments.context: I'll call the supplier about the new order today instead of the old one

policy_note: Multiple fields changed simultaneously: deadline + context.

messages: Gaddy: I also need to send the contract to the client by Friday

expected_commitments.required_action: Send the contract to the client
